allow: PowerShell($ua = 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0 Safari/537.36'; foreach \($u in @\('https://www.myscheme.gov.in/schemes/pm-kisan','https://www.myscheme.gov.in/schemes/pmfby','https://pmkisan.gov.in/Documents/RevisedFAQ.pdf','https://nsap.nic.in/Guidelines/nsap_guidelines_oct2014.pdf'\)\) { $code = & curl.exe -s -o NUL -w '%{http_code}' -L -A $ua --max-time 25 $u; Write-Output "$code  $u" })

PowerShell($ua = 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0 Safari/537.36'; & curl.exe -s -L -A $ua --max-time 30 -o "$env:TEMP\\pmkisan_page.html" 'https://www.myscheme.gov.in/schemes/pm-kisan'; $html = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\pmkisan_page.html" -Raw; Write-Output \("size: " + $html.Length\); Write-Output \("has __NEXT_DATA__: " + $html.Contains\('__NEXT_DATA__'\)\); $i = $html.IndexOf\('__NEXT_DATA__'\); if \($i -ge 0\) { Write-Output $html.Substring\($i, 600\) })

PowerShell($ua='Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0 Safari/537.36'; foreach \($u in @\('https://www.indiapost.gov.in/Financial/pages/content/post-office-saving-schemes.aspx','https://www.nsiindia.gov.in/','https://www.india.gov.in/spotlight/sukanya-samriddhi-yojna-scheme-girl-child'\)\) { $code = & curl.exe -s -o NUL -w '%{http_code}' -L -A $ua --max-time 30 $u; Write-Output "$code  $u" })

PowerShell(Set-Location D:\\Adhikaar\\backend; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -ArgumentList '-X','utf8','-m','uvicorn','app.api.main:app','--port','8000'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8000/health; Write-Output "health: $\($h.status\)"; $s = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/schemes; Write-Output "schemes: $\($s.Count\)"; $body = @{message='I am a 30 year old street vendor in Delhi selling vegetables from a cart.'} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/assess -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; Write-Output "status: $\($r.status\)"; $r.results | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.short_name\) => $\($_.verdict\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{message='I am a 30 year old street vendor in Delhi selling vegetables from a cart.'} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/assess -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; Write-Output "results count: $\($r.results.Count\)"; foreach \($x in $r.results\) { Write-Output "$\($x.short_name\) => $\($x.verdict\) | reasons: $\($x.reasons.Count\) | dropped: $\($x.dropped_claims\)" })
